properties.description:
Data Flow to pull data from ADLS RAW to Synapse database
Data Transformation used to update PROJECT  and perform other ETL activities

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Project as string,
		{System No} as string,
		{System Description} as string,
		{Sub System} as string,
		{Sub System Descr.} as string,
		Object as string,
		{Object Description} as string,
		Type as string,
		Disc as string,
		{Discipline Description} as string,
		Sheet as string,
		{Sheet Des} as string,
		{Sheet Status} as string,
		{Ok Y/N} as string,
		Approver as string,
		{Status date} as string,
		A as string,
		B as string,
		C as string,
		D as string,
		Barcode as string,
		{Phase No} as string,
		SrcFileNam as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false) ~> srcCheckSheetRAWLatest
srcCheckSheetRAWLatest derive(Project = iif(length(Project)>5,concat('99',Project),Project)) ~> DataTransformation
DataTransformation filter(!isNull(Project) && !isNull({System No}) && !isNull({Sub System})) ~> FltNULL
FltNULL sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	input(
		stage_coconsole_checksheet_id as integer,
		Project as string,
		System_No as string,
		System_Description as string,
		Sub_System as string,
		Sub_System_Descr as string,
		Object as string,
		Object_Description as string,
		Type as string,
		Disc as string,
		Discipline_Description as string,
		Sheet as string,
		Sheet_Des as string,
		Sheet_Status as string,
		Ok as string,
		Approver as string,
		Status_date as string,
		A as string,
		B as string,
		C as string,
		D as string,
		Barcode as string,
		Phase_No as string,
		SrcFileName as string
	),
	deletable:false,
	insertable:true,
	updateable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	truncate:true,
	format: 'table',
	staged: true,
	allowCopyCommand: true,
	errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
	mapColumn(
		Project,
		System_No = {System No},
		System_Description = {System Description},
		Sub_System = {Sub System},
		Sub_System_Descr = {Sub System Descr.},
		Object,
		Object_Description = {Object Description},
		Type,
		Disc,
		Discipline_Description = {Discipline Description},
		Sheet,
		Sheet_Des = {Sheet Des},
		Sheet_Status = {Sheet Status},
		Ok = {Ok Y/N},
		Approver,
		Status_date = {Status date},
		A,
		B,
		C,
		D,
		Barcode,
		Phase_No = {Phase No},
		SrcFileName = SrcFileNam
	)) ~> snkChekSheetRptSynapse
